title: Improver review UI: reapply-failed status + Ecosystem tab

segments.text: Improver review UI: reapply-failed + Ecosystem tab
segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · improver Fitting

beats.caption: The review queue: one pending, one applied, one stuck after an ecosystem update
beats.expectedScreen: queue tab listing three proposal cards with PENDING, APPLIED, and REAPPLY-FAILED badges

beats.caption: The stuck entry shows WHY it could not be restored
beats.expectedScreen: the reapply-failed card showing the reapplyFailureReason text about a conflict

beats.caption: Approve stays disabled, but Reject is enabled - dismiss it
beats.expectedScreen: the stuck-1 card after clicking Reject, now showing a REJECTED badge

beats.caption: Dismissing it did NOT change the rule's autonomy - still auto, streak 3/5, rejected 0
beats.expectedScreen: autonomy tab showing memory-consolidation as AUTO with rejected 0 and streak 3/5

beats.caption: The Ecosystem tab: last ecosystem-update + reapply-sweep run status
beats.expectedScreen: ecosystem tab showing an Ecosystem update card (skipped) and a Reapply sweep card (1 failed)

segments.text: Observability + a safe dismiss path for stuck reapply failures
segments.subtitle: docs/autothing/runs/20260701-092738-9b939e7a
